creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to bagas from comment #0)
pkg which /usr/local/lib/libexslt.so.0
/usr/local/lib/libexslt.so.0 was installed by package libxslt-1.1.37_1

Rebuild and reinstall textproc/libxslt.
Probably you missed port security/libgcrypt or only libgcrypt.so.20 from this port.
